visuals.title: P Np Classes
visuals.svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E3F2FD"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#BBDEFB"/>
    </linearGradient>
  </defs>
  <rect width="420" height="350" fill="url(#bg)" rx="12"/>
  <text x="210" y="25" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0">P and NP Classes</text>
  <rect x="50" y="50" width="100" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="100" y="75" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">P (Polynomial Time)
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <rect x="170" y="50" width="100" height="40" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="220" y="75" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">NP (Nondeterministic Polynomial Time)
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <rect x="50" y="120" width="100" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="100" y="145" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">Decision Problems
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <rect x="170" y="120" width="100" height="40" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="220" y="145" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">Optimization Problems
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <line x1="100" y1="90" x2="220" y2="90" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  <text x="160" y="100" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">Relationship
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
</svg>
